mnemonics.title: Central Tendency Selection
mnemonics.content: MMM Rule: Mean for Normal, Median for Skewed, Mode for Categorical

mnemonics.title: Empirical Rule Percentages
mnemonics.content: 68-95-99.7 Rule: 1σ = 68%, 2σ = 95%, 3σ = 99.7% of data in normal distribution

mnemonics.title: Skewness Direction
mnemonics.content: Tail Tells Tale: The direction of the longer tail indicates the type of skew (right tail = positive skew, left tail = negative skew)
